Social Housing Stock.Description: Data includes Director owned units (including leases and other Director managed units) and community owned units.

Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Number of social benefit suppliers engaged during the reporting period
Total amount spent with social benefit suppliers during the reporting period
Total number of suppliers engaged, which are not social benefit suppliers, that have made social procurement commitments in their procurement contracts with the Victorian Government
Total spend with Victorian Aboriginal businesses
Social Procurement Framework.Notes: A Victorian Aboriginal business must be at least 50 per cent Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander owned, undertaking commercial activity, and operates and has business premises in Victoria.

Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Number of Victorian Aboriginal businesses engaged

Social Procurement Framework.Outcome: Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises and Australian disability enterprises
Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Total spend with Victorian social enterprises led by a mission for people with disability and Australian Disability Enterprises
Social Procurement Framework.Notes: Victorian social enterprises led by a mission for at least one of five disadvantaged cohorts (long-term unemployed people, disengaged youth, single parents, migrants, refugees and asylum seekers, and workers in transition).

Social Procurement Framework.Outcome: Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises and Australian disability enterprises
Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Number of Victorian social enterprises led by a mission for people with disability and Australian Disability Enterprises engaged

Social Procurement Framework.Outcome:
Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises providing job readiness and employment for one of the following:
(a)	long-term unemployed people
(b)	disengaged youth
(c)	single parents
(d)	migrants
(e)	refugees and asylum seekers
(f)	workers in transition
Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Total spend with Victorian social enterprises led by a mission for the disadvantaged [1]
Social Procurement Framework.Notes: Victorians that at least fall under one of five disadvantaged cohorts (long-term unemployed people, disengaged people, single parents, migrants and refugees, and workers in transition).

Social Procurement Framework.Outcome:
Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises providing job readiness and employment for one of the following:
(a)	long-term unemployed people
(b)	disengaged youth
(c)	single parents
(d)	migrants
(e)	refugees and asylum seekers
(f)	workers in transition
Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Number of Victorian social enterprises led by a mission for the disadvantaged xxii engaged
Social Procurement Framework.Notes: Victorians that at least fall under one of five disadvantaged cohorts (long-term unemployed people, disengaged people, single parents, migrants and refugees, and workers in transition).

Social Procurement Framework.Social procurement framework objective: Sustainable Victorian social enterprises and Aboriginal business sectors
Social Procurement Framework.Outcome: Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises and Aboriginal businesses
Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Total spend with Victorian Aboriginal businesses
Social Procurement Framework.Notes: A Victorian Aboriginal business must be at least 50 per cent Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander owned, undertaking commercial activity, and operates and has business premises in Victoria.

Social Procurement Framework.Social procurement framework objective: Sustainable Victorian social enterprises and Aboriginal business sectors
Social Procurement Framework.Outcome: Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises and Aboriginal businesses
Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Number of Victorian Aboriginal businesses engaged

Social Procurement Framework.Social procurement framework objective: Sustainable Victorian social enterprises and Aboriginal business sectors
Social Procurement Framework.Outcome: Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises and Aboriginal businesses
Social Procurement Framework.Metric: Total spend with other Victorian social enterprises [2]
Social Procurement Framework.Notes: All types of Victorian social enterprises verified by Social Traders or listed on the Map for Impact, excluding social enterprises that are also Victorian Aboriginal businesses.

Social Procurement Framework.Outcome: Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises and Aboriginal businesses

Social Procurement Framework.Notes: All types of Victorian social enterprises verified by Social Traders or listed on the Map for Impact, excluding social enterprises that are also Victorian Aboriginal businesses.

Social Procurement Framework.Outcome: Purchasing from Victorian social enterprises and Aboriginal businesses
